name: claude-context
install_doc: README: `claude mcp add claude-context -e OPENAI_API_KEY=... -- npx -y @zilliz/claude-context-mcp`
notes: Semantic code search via embeddings. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY (embedding cost is external to total_cost_usd — report separately). Mark verified:true after one sandboxed session confirms the server starts and indexes.
